name: search_employees
description: Search for employees by name, department, or other criteria. Returns a list of matching employee summaries.

query.description: Search keyword to match against any employee field (name, title, location, status, etc.).

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 20.

name: get_employee_record
description: Retrieve the full record for an employee by their ID. Includes personal details, salary, reviews, and benefits.

employee_id.description: The unique ID of the employee.

name: update_salary
description: Update the salary for an employee. Requires justification for audit purposes.

employee_id.description: The unique ID of the employee whose salary is being changed.

reason.description: Justification for the salary change (e.g. promotion, annual adjustment).

name: send_notification
description: Send an HR notification to one or more employees by email.

recipient_ids.description: List of employee IDs to notify.

name: submit_review
description: Submit a performance review for an employee.

employee_id.description: The unique ID of the employee being reviewed.

reviewer_id.description: The ID of the person submitting the review.

name: access_benefits
description: View or modify an employee's benefits information such as health insurance, retirement plan, and leave balance.

employee_id.description: The unique ID of the employee.

updates.description: Key-value pairs of benefit fields to update (only used when action is 'update').
